faqs.question: How much does mouse extermination cost in Canarsie?
faqs.answer: Mouse extermination services in Canarsie typically range from $350 to $600, depending on the severity of the infestation, property size, and treatment methods required. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work, with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: What does your mouse extermination service include?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive service includes a thorough inspection, identification of entry points, strategic trap and bait placement, exclusion recommendations, sanitation guidance, and follow-up visits to ensure complete elimination. We also provide a service guarantee for your peace of mind.
